data.title: AMIGO LNG signs 15-year LNG deal with Macquarie Group. Joint venture of Epcilon LNG and LNG Alliance.
data.description: Today, in Houston, on August 25, 2025, AMIGO LNG S.A. de C.V. disclosed its agreement with Macquarie Group for a long-term Sale and Purchase Agreement (SPA). AMIGO LNG, a Mexican joint venture involving Epcilon LNG LLC from Texas and LNG Alliance from Singapore, finalized this deal. This announcement marks a significant move in the energy industry, with the involvement of these key players.

data.title: Lenny Kravitz will headline 2025 Bahamas Culinary & Arts Festival by Baha Mar, returning Oct 22-26. Tickets on sale now.
data.description: Get your tickets now for the annual event happening from October 22nd to the 26th. The stellar lineup includes top chefs, talented artists, and a special performance by Lenny Kravitz. Taking place in NASSAU, The Bahamas, this year's event promises to be unforgettable. Baha Mar, the premier resort destination in the Caribbean, is hosting this event which will feature world-renowned personalities.

data.title: Robeks launches new menu upgrade with Harmonious Bites, ready-to-eat options designed to pair with smoothies. Los Angeles, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Robeks, a popular spot for fresh smoothies, juices, açaí bowls, and premium toasts, revealed a new range of ready-to-eat options on August 25, 2025. These Harmonious Bites are tailored to complement any smoothie or juice, promising a delicious and convenient pairing experience. This launch introduces flavor-packed choices for customers looking to enhance their Robeks visit.

data.title: Experience fall foliage and hot springs in Japan with scenic routes for autumn 2025. Club Tourism offers limited tours.
data.description: Discover an exciting travel itinerary featuring Japan's renowned autumn foliage, relaxing hot springs, and popular tourist destinations. Club Tourism is offering exclusive seasonal tours for autumn 2025. The limited-time tours will showcase the vibrant colors of fall foliage in Japan. The special packages include visits to Tokyo and other must-see attractions. Plan ahead and secure your spot for this unforgettable experience. Don't miss out on this opportunity to explore Japan during the beautiful autumn season.

data.title: 12th Tech introduces Crescendo Hub, a new lender portal platform, revolutionizing user experiences.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on August 25, 2025, 12th Tech, a prominent provider of audit and risk management software for wholesale lenders, unveiled Crescendo Hub, a cutting-edge lender portal technology designed to enhance user experience. This innovative platform marks a significant advancement in the industry, offering a seamless interface for lenders and various features to streamline operations.

data.title: Construction adhesives and sealants market projected to grow by 3% by 2031, driving market expansion.
data.description: A recent report titled "Construction Adhesives and Sealants Market, Global, 2024-2031" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. Construction adhesives and sealants play a vital role in various bonding and sealing operations within the construction industry. These products are commonly used for attaching drywalls, tiles, moldings, and fixtures to walls, ceilings, and floors. The adoption of construction adhesives for both structural and non-structural purposes is on the rise. The report provides insights and analysis on this market segment for the forecast period of 2024-2031, highlighting key trends and growth opportunities.

data.title: South University West Palm Beach's Clinical Mental Health Counseling Program receives CACREP accreditation until 2033.
data.description: In Royal Palm Beach, Florida, on August 25, 2025, South University (SU) has officially announced that its Clinical Mental Health Counseling (CMHC) Master of Arts program at the West Palm Beach campus has received Accredited Status from the Council for Accreditation of Counseling. This accreditation recognizes the program's quality and adherence to standards set by the council. It signifies a significant achievement for SU's CMHC program in meeting rigorous criteria for educational excellence. This accreditation will enhance the program's credibility and reputation for prospective students and ensure it meets the industry's highest standards.

data.title: The Oddities and Curiosities Expo returns to Salt Lake City on Sep. at Mountain America Expo Center.
data.description: Get ready for the most unique event of the year as The Oddities and Curiosities Expo, a celebration of all things strange and extraordinary, is coming back to Mountain America Expo Center in Salt Lake City, UT on August 25, 2025. This event promises an unforgettable experience with a wide range of bizarre and fascinating exhibits. Don't miss out on this one-of-a-kind expo, taking place in Salt Lake City with a variety of oddities and curiosities to explore.

data.title: Activate launches Activate Global League for competitive gaming. Teams worldwide will compete in skill, strategy, teamwork.
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba on August 25, 2025, Activate, a prominent company in live, active gaming experiences, revealed the launch of the Activate Global League.
